## Documentation Issue

- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Typo or grammar error
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Outdated content
- [ ] Confusing example

## Location

```text
(e.g., docs/sessions/L1/S1.md, README.md)
```

## Current vs Suggested

**Current:**  
**Suggested:**  
**Why better:**

## Checklist

- [ ] Verified the file exists
- [ ] Read [Educational Content Rules](../../.cursor/rules/01_educational-content-rules.mdc)
